description_long: This modern bungalow is set within a rectangular, walled lot featuring a lush garden, a swimming pool, and multiple outdoor seating areas. The main structure is composed of two interconnected volumes, one with a flat roof and the other with a gable roof, both finished in light-colored materials. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The property includes a driveway with a covered carport, a private entrance gate, and landscaped greenery along the perimeter. The backyard is highlighted by a rectangular pool, sun loungers, and a shaded patio area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience.
description: A modern, light-colored bungalow with flat and gable roofs, large windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped gardens within a walled lot.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front gate, driveway, carport, and the main entrance, with the pool and patio visible in the backyard.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the pool area, sun loungers, and the rear facade with large windows and a terrace.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a side perspective, showing the gable roof, garden, and the connection between the two main building volumes.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the driveway, carport, and the rear garden, with the main building and pool area in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
